title: GA → TARS Claim
description: A single typed music-theory fact asserted by the GA chatbot, ingested by TARS for self-consistency (not truth) checking. See docs/contracts/2026-06-20-ga-tars-claim.contract.md and docs/adr/0003.

schema_version.description: Contract schema version. Unknown value → consumer halts (fail-closed).

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the response that made the claim.

session_id.description: Conversation id — scopes same-session vs cross-session contradiction.

source.description: Retrieval surface that emitted the claim.

predicate.description: Registered functional predicate (v1: pitch_classes only). Additive — new predicates extend this enum without a schema_version bump.

subject.description: Entity the claim is about, as the chatbot named it (e.g. 'Cmaj7').

key.description: GA-canonicalized 'predicate:subject' — the contradiction-grouping key. The only place GA's domain core is consulted.

asserted_value.description: Value the chatbot's prose asserted, parsed by GA recognizers, stored verbatim (no ground-truth correction). Type depends on predicate; for pitch_classes a sorted array of pitch classes 0-11.

trace_value.description: Value the agent's own co-emitted tool call computed in the same turn, when present. Enables the intra-response contradiction check. Same type as asserted_value.

prose_span.description: Source sentence the assertion was extracted from — for triage/audit.

model.description: LLM that produced the prose — attributes drift to a model.
